openingScene: The HCP is concerned about staffing workflow bottlenecks and is skeptical about adding burden.
firstHcpTurn: I am still skeptical because our workflow and staff capacity are already stretched.

openingScene: The HCP requests trial evidence and endpoint clarity before deciding next steps.
firstHcpTurn: Walk me through the study endpoint data so I can evaluate the evidence clearly.

openingScene: The HCP is skeptical due to prior auth and reimbursement access barriers.
firstHcpTurn: I am not convinced until prior auth and reimbursement access are handled operationally.
